content.text: I'll create a brief PRD for a coffee-ordering service.

input.content:
# PRD: Coffee-Ordering Service

**Status:** Draft · **Author:** erik.labianca@synaptiq.ai · **Date:** 2026-06-05

## 1. Summary
A mobile-first service that lets customers order and pay for coffee ahead of time, then pick it up at a chosen café without waiting in line. Cafés receive and manage orders through a simple kitchen-facing dashboard.

## 2. Problem
Peak-hour lines cost customers time and cost cafés throughput and sales. Customers want to skip the queue; cafés want higher order volume without adding register staff.

## 3. Goals
- Let a customer place and pay for an order in under 60 seconds.
- Give cafés a reliable real-time queue with accurate prep timing.
- Reduce average customer wait at pickup to under 2 minutes.

## 4. Non-Goals
- Delivery / courier logistics.
- Loyalty/rewards program (future phase).
- Multi-café franchise analytics suite.

## 5. Users
- **Customer** — orders, pays, picks up.
- **Barista / café staff** — accepts, prepares, marks orders ready.
- **Café manager** — manages menu, hours, and pricing.

## 6. User Stories
- As a customer, I can browse a café's menu, customize a drink (size, milk, extras), and pay so my order is queued before I arrive.
- As a customer, I get a notification when my order is ready and an ETA while it's being made.
- As a barista, I see incoming orders in sequence with customization details and can mark each as in-progress or ready.
- As a manager, I can edit the menu, set prices, and pause ordering when the café is slammed.

## 7. Core Features (v1)
| Feature | Description |
|---|---|
| Café & menu discovery | Find nearby cafés, view menus and hours. |
| Drink customization | Size, milk, shots, syrups, notes. |
| Cart & checkout | Add multiple items, pay via card/Apple Pay/Google Pay. |
| Order scheduling | Order now or for a future pickup time. |
| Order status | Real-time states: received → preparing → ready → picked up. |
| Staff dashboard | Live queue, item details, status controls, pause toggle. |
| Notifications | Push/SMS on confirmation and when ready. |

## 8. Requirements
**Functional**
- Payment must be authorized before an order enters the café queue.
- Orders include itemized customizations and a unique pickup code.
- Staff can reject/refund an order with a reason; customer is notified.

**Non-Functional**
- Order submission to staff dashboard latency < 3s (p95).
- Service availability 99.9%.
- PCI-compliant payment handling (via a third-party processor; no raw card storage).

## 9. Success Metrics
- ≥ 30% of peak-hour orders placed through the app within 3 months of a café going live.
- Median order-to-ready time and customer pickup wait.
- Order error/refund rate < 2%.
- Repeat-order rate (customers ordering ≥ 4x/month).

## 10. Assumptions & Dependencies
- Cafés have a tablet or device for the staff dashboard.
- A third-party payment processor (e.g., Stripe) handles transactions.
- Cafés keep menu and availability up to date.

## 11. Open Questions
- How do we handle out-of-stock items mid-order?
- Refund policy for orders not picked up?
- Do we support tipping at checkout in v1?

## 12. Future Phases
Loyalty/rewards, saved favorites & reorder, group orders, subscriptions, delivery integration.
